tiers.Low: Internal productivity tools only. No PII, no financial impact, and no automated decisions impacting humans. Example: Code autocomplete.
tiers.Medium: Internal tools handling generic data, or customer-facing tools with human-in-the-loop validation. Example: Support email drafts.
tiers.High: Customer-facing autonomous systems, processing unencrypted customer PII, or production code generation. Example: Customer chatbots.
tiers.Critical: Automated pipelines impacting employment, finance, or legal standings, or sending raw PII to public models. Example: Automated resume screening.
